files_modified: N5/scripts/build_status.py (added objective extraction, legacy builds always complete)

decisions.decision: Only v2 builds (with meta.json) show as active
decisions.rationale: V's direction: legacy builds without metadata should not clutter the active builds view. Going forward, only builds with meta.json are tracked as active.

decisions.decision: Legacy builds auto-marked as complete with type='legacy'
decisions.rationale: Preserves 142 legacy builds in completions list for historical reference, but removes them from active tracking.

decisions.decision: Progress bar colors: green ≥75%, yellow 25-74%, red <25%
decisions.rationale: Visual feedback matching Domino's tracker style - green for near-done, yellow for in-progress, red for early/stale.

decisions.decision: Date parsing treats YYYY-MM-DD as local time
decisions.rationale: Fixed bug where 2026-01-18 was displaying as Jan 17 due to UTC parsing shifting the date.
Prevents browser caching stale build data. Refresh button now always fetches fresh data.
Checked PORT_REGISTRY.md first - 50002 was next available in mid-ephemeral range.

recommendations.recommendation: voice-optimization-loop shows 0% with no workers - may need its meta.json workers field populated if it's a real active build.
Consider adding click-through links from build cards to PLAN.md or build folders for quick access.

tests_run: API /api/builds returns correct JSON with cache-control headers
Dashboard shows 2 active builds (only v2 with meta.json)
Progress bar shows 80% green for build-orchestrator-v2
Show All/Less toggle works for completions list
Refresh button fetches fresh data (no caching)
notes_for_orchestrator: W3.1's build_status.py was enhanced beyond the original brief to support objective extraction from PLAN.md and v2-only active filtering.
The dashboard aggregates worker counts across all active builds in the header (8/10 workers across active builds).
